title: Upgrading the Moderation API with our new multimodal moderation model
titleZh: 使用我们新的多模式审核模型升级审核API
summary: We’re introducing a new model built on GPT-4o that is more accurate at detecting harmful text and images, enabling developers to build more robust moderation systems.
summaryZh: 我们正在引入基于GPT-4o的新模型，该模型更准确地检测有害文本和图像，使开发人员能够构建更强大的审核系统。
highlights: We’re introducing a new model built on GPT-4o that is more accurate at detecting harmful text and images, enabling developers to build more robust moderation systems.
